## Section 4 — Safety Rules Verification

| Rule | Implemented |
|---|---|
| No direct frontend entity reads | ✅ All data via Phase 3 services |
| No direct frontend entity mutations | ✅ No mutations; write sub-features inactive |
| No client-trusted master_general_agent_id | ✅ ID resolved server-side via scopeGate |
| No cross-MGA visibility | ✅ All service filters enforced by effective_mga_id |
| Fail closed on missing scope | ✅ Access Restricted shown on any denial or error |
| scopeGate on every operation | ✅ All Phase 3 services call checkScope before data access |
| Audit metadata on all material actions | ✅ Phase 3 services call prepareAndRecordAudit |
| No document metadata leakage | ✅ file_url never exposed on Documents panel |
| No impersonation leakage | ✅ Security/impersonation events filtered for non-platform-admin |
| Sub-features inactive | ✅ Invite, TXQuote transmit, report exports all inactive |
